hero.eyebrow: Senior Software Engineer · Web development · Digital support
hero.title: Hi, I am Federico Croletti. I create simple, modern and reliable digital solutions.
hero.subtitle: I am a Senior Software Engineer specialized in Angular, and I also help professionals, small businesses and private clients with websites, WordPress, digital identity tools, certified email, digital signatures, backups, email management, PC formatting and practical AI usage.
hero.panelText: I combine enterprise experience with practical support: I can work on complex Angular architectures, publish simple websites and help with everyday digital problems, including AI usage backed by AWS Certified AI Practitioner knowledge.

servicesPreview.title: Practical services for companies, professionals and private clients
servicesPreview.body: From Angular and WordPress websites to PC support, formatting, backups, email, digital identity, certified email, digital signatures and AI tools: the goal is to make technology simpler and more useful.

skills.title: Development, digital support and practical AI

webPractical.title: Websites and WordPress
webPractical.body: Personal sites, showcase websites, landing pages, restyling, contact forms and support publishing online.

digitalSupport.title: Digital support
digitalSupport.body: Digital identity, certified email, digital signatures, email management, data backup, PC formatting, configurations and everyday issues.

frontend.title: Modern front-end
frontend.body: Angular, TypeScript, HTML, SCSS, Angular Material, RxJS, NgRx.

architecture.title: Enterprise architecture
architecture.body: Micro Frontend, Module Federation, shared libraries, federated routing, design systems.

leadership.title: Technical leadership
leadership.body: Team leading, mentoring, code review, clear priorities and stakeholder communication.

aiCloud.title: AI and cloud mindset
aiCloud.body: Practical AI usage, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, lightweight automations and AWS Certified AI Practitioner certification.

experience.title: Enterprise experience and concrete digital support
experience.body: I have worked on financial, insurance, geospatial and document-management applications, and I bring the same method to websites, digital services, operational support, AI automations and everyday technical problems.

points.websitesWordpress: Personal sites, showcase websites, WordPress and online publishing
points.digitalServices: Support for digital identity, certified email, digital signatures and online procedures
points.backupEmailFormatting: Data backups, email management, PC formatting and setup
points.aiCertification: Applied AI with AWS Certified AI Practitioner certification
points.maps: Interactive maps based on Leaflet and WMS
points.auth: Integration with authentication systems such as Keycloak

help.title: Clear technology even when the problem is not technical on paper
help.body: An account that does not work, an email box to configure, a PC to fix or a website to publish can block entire days. I help you understand the problem, choose a sensible path and solve it with order.
help.panel: My approach is practical: I listen, translate the problem into clear steps and propose a sustainable solution without complicating what should remain simple.

intro.first: I am Federico Croletti, a Senior Software Engineer experienced in designing and developing enterprise applications. I work on Angular, modern architectures, micro frontends, i18n, interactive maps and code quality, but also on concrete digital services for people and small businesses.
intro.second: I have worked across financial, insurance, geospatial and document-management contexts. Beyond development, I support Team Leadership and People Management and bring the same method to websites, WordPress, digital identity, certified email, digital signatures, backups, email management, PC formatting and AI tools.
intro.personal: I like keeping technical skill and human connection on the same level: behind every project there are people, concrete goals and decisions that should become simpler. This photo gives a face to the story I share here, for clients, colleagues and followers who want to know me better.

photo.alt: Federico Croletti in the mountains with an alpine landscape in the background
photo.caption: A face behind the code: I work with technical precision, but I always start by listening to people.

cv.title: Download my CV
cv.body: Want to learn more about my professional path, experience and technical skills? You can download my updated CV as a PDF.

services.intro: I help private clients, professionals, small businesses and companies with websites, IT support, digital tools, AI automations and technical consulting. Each service is explained clearly, so you immediately know what to expect.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Want to discuss a project, collaboration, job opportunity or technical consulting? Write to me: I will reply as soon as possible.

info.title: Public channels
info.servicesBody: Need a website, digital support or help with AI tools? You can describe the problem through the form.

form.title: Send a request
form.subject: Subject
form.privacyCopy: The data entered will only be used to reply to your request. It will not be used for newsletters or unsolicited commercial communication.
form.success: Message sent successfully. I will reply as soon as possible.
form.error: The message could not be sent through the external form service. Please try again later or write to me directly by email.
form.endpointMissing: The form service endpoint is not configured. Insert the real value in environment.contactEndpoint.
form.networkError: The form service is not reachable from this network or was blocked by the browser/proxy. The message was not sent.
form.backendEmailMissing: The backend is reachable, but email delivery is not configured on the server yet. The message was not sent.
form.providerRejected: The form service did not explicitly confirm message delivery. For safety, the message is not considered sent.

requestTypes.digitalIdentity: Certified email / digital identity / digital signature

errors.messageMin: The message must contain at least 20 characters.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This notice explains how Federico Croletti processes personal data collected through the website, contact channels, online form and technical tools required to operate the service.

owner.title: Owner
owner.body: The data controller is Federico Croletti, who can be contacted at federico.croletti@gmail.com. The website is personal and professional in nature and presents skills, projects, IT services and contact channels. A DPO has not been appointed because, at present, the GDPR conditions requiring one do not apply.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: Data is processed to present professional activity, show projects and services, reply to requests sent through the form, email, WhatsApp or social channels, evaluate collaborations or job opportunities, manage possible pre-contractual or contractual relationships and keep the website secure and functional.

data.title: Processed data
data.body: The data processed may include full name, email address, subject, request type, message content, confirmation of having read the privacy notice, language and cookie preferences stored in the browser, technical browsing data processed by hosting and security providers, aggregated analytics data only with consent, and any data the user voluntarily sends through email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn or GitHub.

mandatory.title: Mandatory and optional data
mandatory.body: Mandatory form fields are necessary to send and manage the request. If they are not provided, the message cannot be sent or properly answered. Users are asked not to include special categories of data under Article 9 GDPR, judicial data or unnecessary information; any excessive data will be processed only if necessary to reply or deleted if irrelevant.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: The legal bases are the performance of pre-contractual or contractual measures requested by the data subject, legitimate interest in managing voluntarily received communications and protecting the website, compliance with any legal obligations and consent for non-essential analytics tools. Consent can be withdrawn at any time through cookie preferences.

processing.title: Processing methods
processing.body: Processing is carried out through IT and telematic tools, including a static website, hosting services, email, contact form, email delivery services and analytics tools loaded only after consent. The frontend code does not contain SMTP credentials or private secret keys; any public keys present are used only for integration with configured providers.

formProvider.title: External form service
formProvider.body: The contact form is configured to send messages through EmailJS, without a proprietary backend and without a public fallback to other form services. Data entered in the form is transmitted to EmailJS to deliver the message to the controller's email address, according to the provider's notice and terms.

hosting.title: Hosting and publication
hosting.body: The site is published on Render.com. The hosting provider may process technical data required to provide the service, such as IP addresses, request logs, user agent, access date and time, requested URLs and security information, according to its own notices and terms.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Received messages are kept for the time necessary to reply and manage the request, normally no longer than 12 months if no professional relationship follows. In case of collaboration, assignment or administrative obligations, the necessary data may be retained for the period required by applicable law and for rights protection. Cookie preferences remain in the browser until deletion, withdrawal or consent version update.

recipients.title: Recipients and technical providers
recipients.body: Data may be processed by Federico Croletti and by strictly necessary technical providers: Render.com for hosting, EmailJS for message delivery, Google Fonts and Material Icons for graphic and typography resources, Plausible for aggregated statistics only with consent, and the external services chosen by the user when opening links to email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn or GitHub.

transfers.title: Transfers outside the EU
transfers.body: Some technical providers may process data outside the European Economic Area. In such cases, processing takes place according to the safeguards indicated by the respective providers, such as adequacy decisions, standard contractual clauses or other tools provided by Articles 44 et seq. GDPR.

newsletter.title: Newsletter and marketing
newsletter.body: The site does not provide newsletter subscription, automated commercial communications, advertising profiling or disclosure of data to third parties for marketing purposes. Any commercial reply is limited to requests voluntarily sent by the user.

cookiesAnalytics.title: Cookies and analytics
cookiesAnalytics.body: The site uses necessary local technologies, such as localStorage, to remember language and cookie preferences. Plausible Analytics is disabled by default and is loaded only after consent to the Analytics category. Google Analytics, advertising tools, retargeting pixels or marketing cookies are not configured.

thirdParties.title: Third-party services
thirdParties.body: External links to email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn and GitHub are present. When the user opens those links, subsequent processing is governed by the respective services' notices. The site loads resources from Google Fonts/Material Icons and may load Plausible only after consent. Embedded maps, YouTube videos, reCAPTCHA, Google Tag Manager, Microsoft Clarity, Meta Pixel or embedded social widgets are not present.

security.title: Security
security.body: Technical measures proportionate to the nature of the website are adopted, including HTTPS publication, minimization of requested data, an anti-spam honeypot in the form and absence of private credentials in the frontend. No online system can guarantee absolute security, but processing is limited to what is necessary for the stated purposes.

rights.title: Data subject rights
rights.body: The data subject may exercise, within the limits provided by the GDPR, the rights of access, rectification, deletion, restriction, objection, portability and withdrawal of consent. A complaint may also be lodged with the Italian Data Protection Authority or the competent supervisory authority.

contact.title: Privacy contact
contact.body: For privacy requests, exercise of rights or withdrawal of consent, you can write to federico.croletti@gmail.com indicating Privacy in the subject. Requests will be handled within the time limits provided by applicable law.

updates.title: Updates
updates.body: This notice may be updated if the site, external services, purposes or processing methods change. Last update: 24/07/2026.

legalReview.title: Scope of this notice
legalReview.body: This notice applies only to this website and the connected contact channels. It does not govern third-party websites, platforms or services reachable through external links, which remain autonomous controllers or processors according to their own terms.

banner.title: Cookie preferences
banner.body: We use essential cookies. With consent, Plausible helps measure visits without profiling. Accept, reject or manage preferences.

preferences.title: Manage cookie preferences
preferences.intro: You can choose which non-essential categories to enable. Necessary cookies remain active because they are required for the basic operation of the site.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.body: Required for the basic operation of the site and to remember cookie preferences in the browser through localStorage. They do not require prior consent.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: If accepted, Plausible is loaded for aggregated statistics about site usage. This category is disabled by default and is not loaded before consent.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.body: Marketing, profiling or advertising tools are not configured. This category remains disabled.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This page describes cookies, localStorage and external services used by the website, distinguishing between necessary tools and tools activated only with consent.

what.title: What cookies are
what.body: Cookies are small files saved by the browser. Similar technologies, such as localStorage, make it possible to store local preferences without necessarily sending information to a server on each request. In this policy, the term cookie is used broadly to include these technologies as well.

technical.title: Technical and necessary cookies
technical.body: The site uses tools necessary for operation and preference storage, including the localStorage key federico-croletti-cookie-consent-v1 for cookie consent and preferred-language for the selected language. These tools do not profile the user and do not require prior consent.

preferences.title: Consent preferences
preferences.body: The user's choice is saved in the browser together with the consent version and update date. It is used to avoid showing the banner on every visit and to remember whether the Analytics category was accepted or rejected. The choice can be changed from the Manage cookie preferences button in the footer.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Plausible Analytics is disabled by default and is dynamically loaded from plausible.io only if the user accepts the Analytics category. The tool is used for aggregated statistics about site usage, such as visited pages and traffic trends, without advertising profiling purposes.

marketing.title: Marketing and profiling
marketing.body: Marketing cookies, advertising pixels, retargeting, commercial profiling or advertising tools are not present. The Marketing category is kept disabled and is not used by the site.

thirdParties.title: Third-party services
thirdParties.body: The site uses Render.com for hosting, Google Fonts and Material Icons for fonts and icons, EmailJS for contact form delivery, and Plausible only after analytics consent. Links to email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn and GitHub are also present. Embedded maps, YouTube videos, reCAPTCHA, Google Tag Manager, Microsoft Clarity, Meta Pixel or embedded social widgets are not present.

manage.title: How to change consent
manage.body: You can change or revoke consent at any time from the Manage cookie preferences button in the site footer. Rejecting non-essential tools does not prevent navigation, use of the main pages or submission of the contact form.

browser.title: Browser settings
browser.body: You can also delete cookies and local data from your browser settings. Deleting localStorage or site data removes saved preferences and will make the banner appear again on the next visit.

updates.title: Updates
updates.body: This Cookie Policy may be updated if new technical tools, analytics, third-party services or different consent management methods are added. Last update: 24/07/2026.

legalReview.title: Relationship with the Privacy Policy
legalReview.body: For information about controller, purposes, legal bases, recipients, transfers and data subject rights, please also see the Privacy Policy. This Cookie Policy supplements the privacy notice for cookies, localStorage and similar tools.
